title: Efficient Capital Markets: Which of the following statements about the efficient market hypothesis...
summary: Identify the false statement about the efficient market hypothesis.
prompt: Which of the following statements about the efficient market hypothesis is FALSE?

options.text: The statement that investors can consistently achieve above-market returns is
Cannot be determined from the given information

solution: The statement that investors can consistently achieve above-market returns is false according to the efficient market hypothesis, which posits that such returns are not sustainable.
